hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -q 'schema\.prisma$' && npx prisma generate 2>&1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '/actions\.ts$'; then t="${f%/actions.ts}/actions.test.ts"; [ -f "$t" ] && npx vitest run "$t" 2>&1 | tail -30; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$b" ] || [ "$b" = "main" ] && exit 0; git rev-parse --verify "origin/$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { printf '{"systemMessage":"Branch \"%s\" has not been pushed yet. Complete the AGENTS.md git workflow: push → open PR → merge into main → return to main."}\n' "$b"; exit 0; }; n=$(git rev-list --count "origin/$b..HEAD" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$n" -gt 0 ] && printf '{"systemMessage":"Branch \"%s\" has %s unpushed commit(s). Complete the AGENTS.md git workflow: push → open PR → merge into main → return to main."}\n' "$b" "$n"; exit 0
